$comment: TEST rung: author the test(s) from the specs' behavior, matching the stub signatures EXACTLY. Includes a property/fuzz target. On a red-gate failure the flow loops back here; `prev_test` is the previous failing test and `feedback` is tdd_red's verdict (both empty on the first pass) - EDIT the prior test to fix exactly what the verdict flags, do not cold-start.

inputs.query: writing Go tests table-driven subtests property invariant fuzz f.Fuzz f.Add assert expected value correct hand-verified Errorf Fatalf testing.T
